title: UsePrinterPort
text: UsePrinterPort Instructs Uniface to connect to the printer using a parallel printer port (as specified in the logical printer definition), instead of the printer name. UsePrinterPort {=} true | false Defaults Assignment file: Application initialization file Section: [printer] Default value: false Description Set UsePrinterPort to true if you are using a printer connected to a parallel port with a name like LPT1:, and no UNC printer name. The port of a printer can change each time Windows is started, especially when using USB printers. Therefore, Uniface does not use the printer port when establishing the context of a printer device. Instead, it relies on the UNC printer name. [printer] UsePrinterPort=true Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
